title: Silent Monsters Mouse Mat Small 10 x 8 inches / 25 x 20 cm, black Mouse Pad, Stitched Edges, washable & rollable Mouse Pad, Gaming Home Office Mousemat, Mousepad non-slip & quiet, Desk Mat
features: 📐PRECISION AND CONTROL - The optimised fabric surface of the Silent Monsters mouse pad offers maximum precision and control. Whether for gaming, office or home office, the mouse glides quietly and smoothly, ideal for fast reactions and precise work.

🌱NATURAL RUBBER BASE - Thanks to the non-slip underside made of natural rubber, the mouse mat always stays in place - even on smooth surfaces. No slipping, no readjustment, just full concentration on play or work.

🌎UNIVERSALLY APPLICABLE - Compatible with all mice, like optical, laser, ball, etc., the mousepad works perfectly at low and high DPI. Whether for gaming or for precise work - it ensures the best performance. Its flexible construction allows it to be easily rolled up and transported at any time.

✅DURABLE & EASY TO CLEAN - The stitched edges prevent fraying, so the mousemat remains durable and hard-wearing. It is also washable at 30°C without ruining the quality or color (gentle cycle). Ideal for everyday use!

🇩🇪GERMAN QUALITY - Rely on the reliability and precision of a German brand. The highest standards in materials and workmanship ensure a durable and environmentally friendly product - developed for gaming, office and home office.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page What sizes do the Silent Monsters mouse pads come in? We offer a wide range of sizes, from compact mouse pads for small work surfaces to extra-large pads for maximum gaming pleasure. Whether for short or long gaming sessions, we have the right size for you. What material are the mouse pads made of? Our mouse pads consist of a smooth, high-quality fabric surface for precise mouse movements and a non-slip underside made of natural rubber that provides a firm grip on all surfaces. What designs are available? Silent Monsters offers a wide range of designs and patterns. From simple, minimalist motifs to lively and creative patterns, there is something for every taste. Are the mouse pads suitable for all mouse types? Yes, our mouse pads are suitable for all types of mice, both optical and laser mice. They offer optimum gliding properties for precise gaming. Are the Silent Monsters mouse pads washable? Yes, the mouse pads are easy to clean and can simply be cleaned with water if necessary. For thorough cleaning, you can also wash them in the washing machine at a low temperature.
